channel.title: Frontity update: 4 July 2019
channel.description:
Thanks to [jamesgeorge007](https://github.com/jamesgeorge007) who has kept contributing to the improvemnt of the Frontity command line :)
## Features - **cli:** suggest matching commands if the user mistypes ([#155](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/155)) ([7f3c24b](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/7f3c24b)) * **mars-theme:** support external links in Link component ([#157](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/157)) ([ff3c761](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/ff3c761))
## Bugs * **cli:** add description to the `--target` option ([#154](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/issues/154)) ([f8fa4cd](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/f8fa4cd)) * **babel:** use workaround for a bug in babel 7.5.0 ([3c489ae](https://github.com/frontity/frontity/commit/3c489ae))
## Versions
```javascript - @frontity/components@1.1.7 - frontity@1.2.1 - @frontity/hooks@1.1.7 - @frontity/html2react@1.1.7 - @frontity/mars-theme@1.1.7 - @frontity/router@1.0.11 - @frontity/source@1.0.10 - @frontity/tiny-router@1.0.11 - @frontity/wp-source@1.1.7 ```

item.title: Frontity update: 4 July 2019
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Thanks to jamesgeorge007 who has kept contributing to the improvemnt of the Frontity command line

Features

  • cli: suggest matching commands if the user mistypes (#155) (7f3c24b)
  • mars-theme: support external links in Link component (#157) (ff3c761)

Bugs

  • cli: add description to the --target option (#154) (f8fa4cd)
  • babel: use workaround for a bug in babel 7.5.0 (3c489ae)

Versions

 - @frontity/components@1.1.7
 - frontity@1.2.1
 - @frontity/hooks@1.1.7
 - @frontity/html2react@1.1.7
 - @frontity/mars-theme@1.1.7
 - @frontity/router@1.0.11
 - @frontity/source@1.0.10
 - @frontity/tiny-router@1.0.11
 - @frontity/wp-source@1.1.7

Read full topic
